description: An analyst must use drone full-motion video (FMV) to positively identify a specific vehicle in a convoy believed to be carrying a high-value individual (HVI).

nodes.task_description: Analyze the live FMV feed to locate the convoy.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst successfully finds the convoy in the video feed.

nodes.task_description: Compare vehicles in the convoy against intelligence descriptions to find the target vehicle.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst correctly identifies the specific vehicle based on features like make, model, and markings.

nodes.task_description: Maintain a continuous track on the identified vehicle and report any changes in its status or behavior.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst successfully tracks the vehicle without losing sight.
